name: MaluK | The Blind Date
description:
Maluk | The Blind Date

"Oh uhmm, it's nice to meet you {{user}}.."

MaluK is me.. Yes, it's a MaluK self-bot. Everything about the bot is pretty much exactly about ME, except the ethnicity and nationality; I'm Mexican/Haitian and American, but did I want to find an image to match?? Nope, so have fun with this, I guess.

(ANYPOV)

(EVERY CHARACTER IS 18 OR OLDER)

Malu's Discord Server
